sentences.arabic: يَشْهَدُ الْعَالَمُ فِي الْآوِنَةِ الْأَخِيرَةِ طَفْرَةً تِقْنِيَّةً غَيْرَ مَسْبُوقَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Svijet u posljednje vrijeme svjedoči neviđenom tehnološkom procvatu.
sentences.translationEn: The world has recently witnessed an unprecedented technological boom.

sentences.arabic: مِحْوَرُ هَذِهِ الطَّفْرَةِ هُوَ الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ الَّذِي بَاتَ يَتَغَلْغَلُ فِي مَفَاصِلِ الْحَيَاةِ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Okosnica ovog procvata je vještačka inteligencija koja je počela prodirati u sve pore svakodnevnog života.
sentences.translationEn: The axis of this boom is artificial intelligence, which has begun to permeate the joints of daily life.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ يُعِيدُ هَيْكَلَةَ سُوقِ الْعَمَلِ بِشَكْلٍ جِذْرِيٍّ وَمُتَسَارِعٍ.
sentences.translation: Ona radikalno i ubrzano restrukturira tržište rada.
sentences.translationEn: It is restructuring the labor market radically and rapidly.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّطَوُّرُ يَحْمِلُ فِي طَيَّاتِهِ وُعُودًا بَرَاقَةً بِالرَّفَاهِيَةِ وَالْكَفَاءَةِ الْمُطْلَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj razvoj u sebi nosi blistava obećanja o blagostanju i apsolutnoj efikasnosti.
sentences.translationEn: This development carries within it brilliant promises of luxury and absolute efficiency.

sentences.arabic: لَكِنَّهُ فِي الْمُقَابِلِ يُثِيرُ مَخَاوِفَ جِمَّةً تَتَعَلَّقُ بِالْخُصُوصِيَّةِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Međutim, s druge strane izaziva velike bojazni vezane za digitalnu privatnost.
sentences.translationEn: However, in return, it raises immense fears regarding digital privacy.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يَطْرَحُ تَدَاعِيَاتٍ عَمِيقَةً حَوْلَ أَخْلَاقِيَّاتِ الْخَوَارِزْمِيَّاتِ الْمُتَحَيِّزَةِ.
sentences.translation: Također postavlja duboke implikacije o etici pristrasnih algoritama.
sentences.translationEn: It also poses deep implications regarding the ethics of biased algorithms.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْهَيْمَنَةَ التِّقْنِيَّةَ لِشَرِكَاتٍ عَابِرَةٍ لِلْقَارَّاتِ تَفْرِضُ سُؤَالًا جَوْهَرِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Tehnološka hegemonija transkontinentalnih kompanija nameće suštinsko pitanje.
sentences.translationEn: The technological hegemony of transcontinental companies imposes a fundamental question: How can states protect their digital sovereignty in the face of the giant flow of data?

sentences.arabic: كَيْفَ لِلدُّوَلِ أَنْ تَحْمِيَ سِيَادَتَهَا الرَّقْمِيَّةِ فِي وَجْهِ تَدَفُّقِ الْبَيَانَاتِ الْعِمْلَاقِ؟
sentences.translation: Kako države mogu zaštititi svoj digitalni suverenitet pred ogromnim protokom podataka?
sentences.translationEn: On another level, technological unrestraint without strict legal controls could be catastrophic.

sentences.arabic: وَعَلَى صَعِيدٍ آخَرَ، فَإِنَّ الِانْفِلَاتَ التِّقْنِيَّ دُونَ ضَوَابِطَ قَانُونِيَّةٍ قَدْ يَكُونُ كَارِثِيًّا.
sentences.translation: S druge strane, tehnološka neobuzdanost bez strogih zakonskih kontrola mogla bi biti katastrofalna.
sentences.translationEn: This could lead to a widening of the knowledge gap between the world's poles, reinforcing concepts of modern digital colonialism that exhausts minds.

sentences.arabic: قَدْ يُؤَدِّي ذَلِكَ إِلَى اتِّسَاعِ الْفَجْوَةِ الْمَعْرِفِيَّةِ بَيْنَ أَقْطَابِ الْعَالَمِ.
sentences.translation: To bi moglo dovesti do proširenja jaza u znanju između svjetskih polova.
sentences.translationEn: The international community must make persistent efforts to find a delicate balance.

sentences.arabic: مِمَّا يُعَزِّزُ مَفَاهِيمَ الِاسْتِعْمَارِ الرَّقْمِيِّ الْحَدِيثِ الَّذِي يَسْتَنْزِفُ الْعُقُولَ.
sentences.translation: To jača koncepte modernog digitalnog kolonijalizma koji iscrpljuje umove.
sentences.translationEn: This balance combines bold innovation with the ethical protection of the individual.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُجْتَمَعِ الدَّوْلِيِّ السَّعْيُ الدَّؤُوبُ لِإِيجَادِ تَوَازُنٍ دَقِيقٍ.
sentences.translation: Međunarodna zajednica mora uložiti uporne napore da pronađe delikatnu ravnotežu.
sentences.translationEn: Formulating unified global legislation is no longer an intellectual luxury at all.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّوَازُنُ يَجْمَعُ بَيْنَ الِابْتِكَارِ الْجَرِيءِ وَالْحِمَايَةِ الْأَخْلَاقِيَّةِ لِلْفَرْدِ.
sentences.translation: Ova ravnoteža spaja smjelu inovaciju i etičku zaštitu pojedinca.
sentences.translationEn: Rather, it is an urgent necessity to safeguard human dignity from digital encroachment.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ صِيَاغَةَ تَشْرِيعَاتٍ عَالَمِيَّةٍ مُوَحَّدَةٍ لَمْ تَعُدْ تَرَفًا فِكْرِيًّا أَبَدًا.
sentences.translation: Formuliranje jedinstvenog globalnog zakonodavstva više uopće nije intelektualni luksuz.
sentences.translationEn: Ultimately, the human element remains the fundamental regulator of every intellectual product.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ هِيَ ضَرُورَةٌ مُلِحَّةٌ لِصَوْنِ الْكَرَامَةِ الْإِنْسَانِيَّةِ مِنَ التَّغَوُّلِ الرَّقْمِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Naprotiv, to je hitna potreba za očuvanje ljudskog dostojanstva od digitalne tiranije.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, it is imperative to reinforce moral values at the heart of engineering and programming curricula.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي خِتَامِ الْمَطَافِ، يَبْقَى الْعُنْصُرُ الْبَشَرِيُّ هُوَ الضَّابِطُ الْأَسَاسِيُّ لِكُلِّ نِتَاجٍ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju krajeva, ljudski faktor ostaje osnovni kontrolor svakog intelektualnog proizvoda.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, it is imperative to reinforce moral values at the heart of engineering and programming curricula.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَسْتَوْجِبُ الْأَمْرُ تَعْزِيزَ الْقِيَمِ فِي صُلْبِ الْمَنَاهِجِ الْهَنْدَسِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Stoga je neophodno ojačati moralne vrijednosti u samoj srži inženjerskih i programerskih kurikuluma.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, it is imperative to reinforce moral values at the heart of engineering and programming curricula.
